'''Maramere''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Mere]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The planet fell under the domination of Lord [[Toat]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], which used it as a repository of [[Stygium/Legends|stygium]] [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] from [[Aeten II/Legends|Aeten II]].

==History==
===Pre–Clone Wars===
The planet was crime-free from [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]] until [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], when [[Sol Sixxa]] killed Toat and, with the assistance of [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], liberated the planet from the Trade Federation, although the Trade Federation used vast resources to recapture the planet, but were finally defeated by Nym with the help of [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

Gallia and Nym first [[Raid on Spacestation 1138|liberated]] prisoners from [[Spacestation 1138]] and defeated [[Harro Ruuk]]. Gallia and Nym's pirates, the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]], had to protect Maramere from [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron's]] [[Hex Deployer]]s and [[Hex Bomber]]s, which tried to poison the planet with [[trihexalon]]. Nym then destroyed the Trade Federation base on [[Mount Merakan]].

At some point prior to its destruction in 22 BBY, [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] [[J-type diplomatic barge/Legends|J-type diplomatic barge]] was stolen while it was on Maramere.

===Clone Wars===
Maramere became a prosperous resort world and remained loyal to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] assassinated [[Drama Korr]] in a starship near Maramere. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] then pushed Durge into an escape pod and sent him to his death in Maramere's sun, [[Karthakk system's sun|Karthakk]].

{{Planet-stub}}
